title: Accessing Ubuntu 24 using the "Remote Login" feature
author: raffaeler
body_snippet:
<!--- Provide a general summary of the issue in the Title above -->
I tested Ubuntu24 new "Remote Login" feature successfully using Windows RDP client. Basically, there are two sets of credentials.
- with the first credential set (which can be specified in the "Remote Login" dialog, the Windows RDP client accesses Ubuntu remote login screen.
- The second set of credentials matches the Ubuntu user, as if you were trying to access from the main (physical) PC

I tried to access Ubuntu 24 using...

iterations.description: Issue body is empty with no bug description, steps to reproduce, or error details about Ubuntu 24 Remote Login (likely RDP/xRDP); only meta-comments about spam blocking are present.

comments.author: EmeraldFlame
comments.snippet:
I'm seeing the same thing here.

Using the built in Windows RDP client, login is fine. Using mRemote, the connection fails and mRemote displays the following error:

```
----------
WarningMsg
11/21/2024 23:57:15
RDP error!
Error Code: 5
Error Description: Language.strRdpErrorCode3
----------
```

comments.author: TangentFoxy
comments.snippet:
Getting the same output as EmeraldFlame.. :\ 
I also can confirm that using Microsoft's Remote Desktop Connection is working fine so it's not a server error.

comments.author: MellowedMatt
comments.snippet: Just wanted to add myself to the folks encountering this issue. Connecting through desktop sharing works fine, but Remote Login fails exactly as EmeraldFlame reports. Connecting through the Windows 11 RDP client works as expected.

comments.author: GlennIgen
comments.snippet:
I have done some testing and can confirm that it's a similar issue on Fedora, latest version (41 Workstation Edition).

It is possible to make it work if you change the resolution to either fullscreen or a fixed resolution.
It's also possible to start in fullscreen, then minimize it to a tab, right-click the tab, and select SmartSize (though the image will appear blurry).

Personally, I just set the resolution to be slightly smaller than the actual window, so I get some gray borders. 😊

![Image]...

comments.author: Kvarkas
comments.snippet:
after investigation is seems RDP v12 not working properly, need to fix that, however you could still connect using v11:

![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/c2be2966-d7f4-4431-86f9-ee4b8e78450a)

hint: I am not linux guy, so just simply installed latest ubuntu 24.04 on VMware, and used this manual: https://www.digitalocean.com/community/tutorials/how-to-enable-remote-desktop-protocol-using-xrdp-on-ubuntu-22-04 

if you want me to test other ways - let me know what to do with ubun...

comments.author: robertpopa22
comments.snippet:
**Fix available for testing**

**Commit:** `6c110776` (fork `robertpopa22/mRemoteNG`, branch `main`)
**What changed:** Accessing Ubuntu 24 using the "Remote Login" feature

A beta build (v1.81.0-beta.4) including this fix is available from the fork's Releases page.
